headline: AI Productivity Gains Precede Expeditors International’s Uncharacteristic Layoffs
summary: The freight forwarder credited artificial intelligence for efficiency improvements just weeks before filing a WARN notice cutting 230 employees.

headline: New Strong Buy Stocks for June 11th
summary: FLYW, EZPW, EXPD, UIS and BFH have been added to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) List on June 11, 2026.
